_comment: Golden corpus for the classifier. Seeded from the legacy test/classify.test.js. Drives BOTH the TS unit tests (expected outputs) and the parity test (legacy classify.js must agree with @pipeline/classify on every case). Grow this file with every real-world misclassification — see plan §14.
